info.title: Simple Chat Service API
info.description: A Laravel-based REST API chat service with JWT auth, chat rooms, direct messaging, and WebSocket support.

message.example: The email has already been taken.

message.example: We can't find a user with that email address.

Not a member of this chat room.

get.summary: Get messages in a chat room

403.description: Must be a member to view messages

message.example: You must join the room to view messages.

post.summary: Send a message to a chat room

message.example: You must join the room to send messages.
